text: In the first image, I feel a sense of serene anticipation. The soft lighting and bean bags scattered on the floor evoke a modern minimalism, inviting reflection yet leaving me acutely aware of the emptiness—a space full of potential, waiting for conversation or creativity. In the second image, surrounded by the bold visuals of research and development, I feel a spark of curiosity and engagement. The colorful walls and technological displays pull me into a dialogue about progress, innovation, and our evolving relationship with machines. Here, I am both observer and participant, poised between contemplation of the past and excitement for the future.
